entity.summary: Centralized crypto exchange whose official site confirms active trading services but does not disclose a verifiable legal domicile or operating origin.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded rows hei_unadded_0329 and hei_unadded_0330 as one entity. HEI reviewed the official exchange and team surfaces but could not verify a legal entity, headquarters, founding jurisdiction, or ecosystem origin. Unknown is an intentional reviewed classification, not a structural missing value.

events.title: BitStorage recorded as centralized exchange
events.description: BitStorage is recorded as an active centralized exchange, with CoinPaprika and CoinGecko candidate rows consolidated into one HEI record; its legal and operating origin remains explicitly Unknown after official-site review.
events.notes: Upgrade the origin only if a verifiable company, licensing, or headquarters source becomes available.

evidence.title: BitStorage official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the BitStorage identity and active exchange interface. Its public exchange and team surfaces did not provide a verifiable origin during the 2026-06-20 review.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika exchange reference for BitStorage
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0329.
